title: ActionModuleVersionReference
description: The latest published version as a reference object. Omitted if no versions have been published.

id.description: The unique ID of the version.

code.description: The source code from this version.

dependencies.description: The npm dependencies from this version.

secrets.description: The secrets from this version (names and timestamps only, values never returned).

created_at.description: Timestamp when the version was created.
